title: turnera selloi
intro: Turnera selloi, also known as Yellow Root or Sello's Turnera, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Turnera selloi include relieving symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), reducing inflammation and pain, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Turnera selloi are often consumed as teas, capsules, or tinctures, and can also be used topically to soothe skin irritations.
